---
title: Filters & Saved Views
description: Filter collection records and save filter presets.
---

The admin panel generates filters automatically from your field definitions. Each field type maps to appropriate filter operators.

## Auto-Generated Filters

| Field Type | Filter Operators |
|---|---|
| `text` | Contains, equals, starts with, ends with |
| `number` | Equals, greater than, less than, between |
| `boolean` | Is true, is false |
| `select` | Is, is not, in |
| `date` / `datetime` | Before, after, between |
| `relation` | Is (picker) |

## Custom Filter Display

Control which fields appear as filters in the list view toolbar. By default, all filterable fields are available.

## Saved Views

Users can save filter combinations as named views for quick access:

1. Apply filters to the list view
2. Click "Save View"
3. Name the view
4. Access it from the views dropdown

Saved views persist per-user and include:
- Active filters
- Sort order
- Visible columns
